title: Consultation on Draft Guidance Document: Safety of Sperm and Ova Regulations – Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on Draft Guidance Document: Safety of Sperm and Ova Regulations – Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
Opened on June 26, 2019 and closed to new input on July 26, 2019.
The draft Guidance Document: Safety of Sperm and Ova Regulations  provides information on the interpretation and application of the Safety of Sperm and Ova Regulations which are made under the Assisted Human  Reproduction Act . The regulations were published in Canada Gazette , Part II on June 26, 2019.
In addition to the regulations, the draft guidance document also  provides an Assisted Human Reproduction  Act interpretation of the Health Canada Directive: Technical Requirements for Conducting the Suitability Assessment of  Sperm and Ova Donors .

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- Academics and experts
- Provinces and territories
- Donor conceived people
- Health professionals and associations
- Intended parents, surrogates, and donors
- Other interested parties

## Goals of the consultation
We are seeking stakeholder comments on the draft guidance  document. The input we collect will be used to finalize the document.

## Related  information
- Assisted Human Reproduction in Canada
If you have a question about the Assisted  Human Reproduction Act you can contact Health Canada in one of the  following ways:
Office of Policy and  International Collaboration Health Products and Food Branch Health Canada Address Locator: 0601B 100 Eglantine Driveway Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Email: hc.bgtd.ahr-pa.dpbtg.sc@canada.ca Telephone: 613-957-2991 Toll free: 1-866-225-0709
